summary: Comprehensive testing of Agora social media MVP. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional - login, post creation, like/repost/bookmark, PostDetail navigation, replies, profile, explore, notifications, dark mode all work correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking on a hashtag inside post content navigates to Explore search (?q=hashtag) instead of PostDetail. This is because renderContent renders hashtags as clickable links that intercept the click. Clicking the article body (outside hashtag) correctly navigates to PostDetail.

integration_issues.issue: Explore page trending section shows 'No trending topics yet' on initial load occasionally (race condition - async fetch). Right sidebar trending always shows correctly. Not a blocking issue.

issues: Shows 'No notifications yet' for test user because the test user is the only user interacting (no self-notifications generated). This is correct behavior, not a bug.

action_items: LOW: Consider preventing hashtag links in post content from stopping propagation to the parent article's click handler (or ensure clicking non-link areas works which it does already)
critical_code_review_comments: PostCard.jsx: renderContent renders hashtags as <a> links that navigate to explore when clicked, but the article also has onClick to navigate to PostDetail. This creates ambiguity - clicking a hashtag goes to explore, clicking elsewhere goes to PostDetail. Could confuse users.
server.py: serialize_post is async and fetches author + likes/reposts/bookmarks individually per post - could be slow with many posts (N+1 query issue). Consider batching lookups.
Notifications page: Mark as read is called via PUT /api/notifications/read, but there's no visual indicator of read vs unread notifications.
Edit profile is inline (not modal) - works correctly but test data-testid 'edit-profile-modal' doesn't exist. The actual testid is 'edit-profile-btn', 'save-edit-btn', 'cancel-edit-btn'.

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all core flows working, minor hashtag click navigation ambiguity

seed_data_creation: Created test posts with #testing and #playwright hashtags. Created second test user testagora2.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs fully functional. Frontend 3-column layout works. Auth (login/register tabs), feed, post CRUD, like/repost/bookmark, PostDetail with replies, profile with tabs, explore with search, notifications, dark mode all working. Minor: hashtag click in post content navigates to explore search instead of PostDetail (article click does work). New Post modal testid is 'composer-modal', not 'post-modal'. Edit profile is inline form with testids: edit-profile-btn, save-edit-btn, cancel-edit-btn.
